title: cascade_filter_response
description: Phase 6. Per-chunk JSON response shape the Stage 2 filter (Sonnet) MUST return. Validated by `spectrum_systems_core.cascade.executor.run_cascade_filter` immediately after the API call returns. On validation failure the executor falls back to a CONSERVATIVE pass-through (every item in the chunk is kept, not dropped) and increments `chunks_with_invalid_filter_response` on the cascade_filter_log — the safer failure mode because dropping a true positive is worse than keeping a false positive in the filtered output.

item_idx.description: Position of the item in the input list the filter was given. Every input item must appear exactly once in the response array.

decision.description: Sonnet's keep/drop judgment. Any other value (e.g. "maybe") fails validation and triggers the conservative pass-through path.

reason.description: One-sentence justification for the decision. Required (minLength 1) so a downstream auditor can read the filter's rationale without re-running.
